# Agent Progress Log

Running repo-local log for agent work, progress, verification, and durable memory pointers.

This file follows `docs/99.templates/templates/governance/progress.template.md`.

## Usage Contract

- AI agents must update this file during repository work.
- Record task progress as concise entries; do not paste transcripts, raw logs, shell history, or secrets.
- Link durable reusable findings to separate memory notes created from `docs/00.agent-governance/memory/template.md`.
- Keep active policy in `rules/`, `scopes/`, provider overlays, runtime files, and root shims; use this file as an audit log and memory index.
- Update the final entry before declaring completion.

Supported/Unsupported/Deferred + output-style placement), Output Style Contract (`rules/output-style.md`), Workflows (`rules/workflows.md`), and Model Policy (`subagent-protocol.md`, WebSearch-verified 2026-05-29: Claude opus-4.8/sonnet-4.6 -> CC aliases `opus`/`sonnet`; Gemini gemini-3.1-pro/gemini-3.5-flash; GPT supervisor/worker mapping later superseded by the 2026-05-31 Codex policy update). New `scripts/operations/sync-provider-surfaces.sh` regenerates `.codex` mirror + `.agents` reference index; `check-repo-contracts.sh` enforces cross-provider name/content/pointer/model parity. All checks pass (failures=0); sync no drift; wiki index fresh.

Updated `scripts/README.md`, recorded evidence in `docs/04.execution/tasks/2026-06-05-language-policy-hard-enforcement.md`, and closed the language-policy Remaining Risks / Follow-up Tasks scope.
- `2026-07-07`: `docs(research)`: Translated and aligned the 2026-07-07 research pack reports, refreshed the code dependency graph, and verified that all local QA gates and repository contracts pass with zero failures.
- `2026-07-08`: `docs(research)`: Gap-analyzed the existing 2026-07-05/2026-07-07 research packs against the requested checklist and closed the confirmed gap by adding `sdlc-document-roles.md` to the 2026-07-05 pack. It defines the role, purpose, timing, owner, template, and stage for each SDLC/operations document type (PRD, ARD, ADR, spec, plan, task, guide, policy, runbook, incident, postmortem) with external anchors (adr.github.io/Nygard, ISO/IEC/IEEE 42010/29148, Google SRE postmortem, NIST SP 800-61, Keep a Changelog/SemVer, PagerDuty runbook), and records the release-documentation template gap. Registered the file in the pack README and cross-linked `spec-driven-sdlc.md`. Protected surfaces (runtime, Compose, workflows, secrets, remote GitHub state) unchanged; `bash scripts/validation/check-repo-contracts.sh` passed with `failures=0`.
- `2026-07-09`: `chore(infra)` + `docs(research)`: Synced the tech-stack version registry and dozzle hardening baseline to the tags actually declared in compose (compose is source of truth): `supabase/postgres` 17.6.1.142->143, `apache/airflow` 3.2.2->3.3.0, `n8nio/runners` 2.29.5->2.29.6, `amir20/dozzle` v10.6.6->v10.6.7; regenerated `tech-stack-version-provenance.md`. No runtime or Compose change (drift-gate registry only). Separately resolved a self-introduced normalization defect: `workspace-baseline.md` used literal template placeholders (`YYYY-MM-DD-<feature>.md` / `-tasks.md`) that the contract normalization gate rejected; re-expressed them in the SDLC-template style (`YYYY-MM-DD-feature.md`), restoring `legacy_target_stage_docs_skipped` 1->0. Two logical-unit commits (`0a358cc8`, `806bc0e2`) pushed to `main`; `bash scripts/validation/check-repo-contracts.sh` passed with `failures=0` (`normalized_target_stage_docs_total=718`).
- `2026-07-09`: `docs(research)`: Closed the checklist gap on "task-characteristic AI agent model configuration". The research packs named the Supervisor/Worker tiers but did not explain per-task model selection, so added `agent-model-selection.md` to the 2026-07-05 pack: the two selection axes (tier/model and reasoning effort), a task-characteristic -> tier/effort mapping table, per-provider mechanics (Claude alias+effort default `high`/`xhigh`, Codex `model_reasoning_effort` xhigh/medium/high/low, Gemini model-as-effort), enforcement via `check-repo-contracts.sh`, and the model-change coupled-surface protocol. Grounded in `subagent-protocol.md` Model Policy and anchored to two WebFetch/WebSearch-verified external sources (Anthropic choosing-a-model, Codex config-reference). Registered in the pack README and cross-linked `provider-implementation-comparison.md`; regenerated the LLM Wiki index/coverage (1251->1252 paths). Reverted 6 unrelated formatter-normalized files to keep the commit surgical. `check-repo-contracts.sh` and `check-doc-traceability.sh` both passed with `failures=0`; committed as `d76ebfed`.
